grader.method: Read every block of every fresh LLM page-reader dossier in canonical order; checked calculations, causal mechanisms, prerequisites, progression, interactions, evidence boundaries, and committed changed-case assessments without consulting source files, prior grades, diffs, or adjacent-course records.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The course home presents a coherent beginner-to-advanced route, explains the learning contract, and makes the five-part lesson rhythm visible before entry.
wholePageReview.feedback: The scope, course counts, progress expectations, and evidence boundaries are mutually consistent. Its concise orientation and ordered path support entry well, although one visual-path description is slightly less direct than the catalog sequence; the page still gives learners clear choices and next actions.
revisionPriorities: Clarify the home visual's route wording so it mirrors the released lesson sequence exactly.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The introduction defines language modeling as conditional next-token prediction and connects that mechanism to the course's full system view.
wholePageReview.feedback: The conceptual boundary between a model, a decoder, and a complete application is accurate and repeatedly tested through changed cases. The progression from orientation to mechanism, lab, transfer, and assessment is sound; only repeated objective disclosures make the page somewhat denser than its opening needs to be.

wholePageReview.synopsis: This page teaches tensor axes and matrix multiplication through named shapes, compatible dimensions, and explicit output calculations.
wholePageReview.feedback: Every shape trace and multiplication rule is internally consistent, and the page correctly treats axis naming as part of correctness rather than bookkeeping. Narrative, code prediction, visual manipulation, and transfer checks reinforce the same mechanism in a well-sequenced beginner progression.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson turns logits into probabilities, cross-entropy, and calibrated uncertainty with stable-softmax arithmetic and changed distributions.
wholePageReview.feedback: Definitions, numerical examples, and probability calculations agree, including the distinction between a high score, normalized probability, and calibrated confidence. The page moves cleanly from mechanism to runnable inspection and unfamiliar-case diagnosis, with strong retry feedback and no evidence overclaim.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page explains gradients as local sensitivity and backpropagation as repeated chain-rule credit assignment through a computation graph.
wholePageReview.feedback: Derivative signs, chain-rule products, and update directions are technically consistent across prose, arithmetic, code, and assessment. The causal trace builds naturally from one scalar path to shared parameters and failure diagnosis, giving learners multiple committed opportunities to reconstruct the mechanism.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson develops optimizer behavior from learning-rate-scaled gradients through momentum, adaptive statistics, schedules, and a measured training capstone.
wholePageReview.feedback: Update arithmetic and distinctions among SGD, momentum, Adam-style state, clipping, and schedules are accurate and supported by concrete checks. The learning loop is comprehensive, but the opening frames the capstone before giving the clean optimizer definition, and the long project material makes the narrative less economical than the mechanism itself.
revisionPriorities: Open with a direct optimizer definition before introducing the capstone deliverable.

wholePageReview.synopsis: Tokenization is taught as a reversible text-to-ID contract whose vocabulary, boundaries, and special tokens shape every later model tensor.
wholePageReview.feedback: The lesson accurately separates characters, bytes, subwords, token IDs, and decoded text, while treating tokenizer identity as part of model compatibility. Its examples and lab expose boundary changes and misleading token counts, and the changed-case assessment verifies transfer rather than mere vocabulary recall.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page presents embeddings as learned table lookups that turn discrete token IDs into trainable dense vectors with explicit shapes.
wholePageReview.feedback: Lookup equivalence, tensor dimensions, gradient locality, similarity limits, and tied-output distinctions are accurate. The narrative moves smoothly from a single row lookup to batch tensors and semantic caveats, with prediction-led code and transfer tasks that require shape reasoning.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson shows why attention needs order information and compares absolute, sinusoidal, rotary, and relative position mechanisms at their proper boundaries.
wholePageReview.feedback: It correctly distinguishes permutation symmetry, causal masking, position signals, and extrapolation limits without implying that any method makes long context free. Worked permutations, notation, and changed-case tests align, and the explanation-to-lab flow makes an otherwise invisible invariance observable.

wholePageReview.synopsis: Attention is derived as query-key matching followed by normalized value mixing, with masks, heads, and shapes kept explicit.
wholePageReview.feedback: The score scaling, softmax, masking, weighted sum, and multi-head shape logic are consistent throughout. A compact worked trace, mechanism visual, code prediction, and boundary transfer collectively support both beginner intuition and exact tensor reasoning.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page assembles attention, MLPs, residual streams, normalization, and depth into one causal account of Transformer blocks.
wholePageReview.feedback: Component roles and pre-normalized residual updates are presented accurately without assigning human-like meanings to individual layers. The page's staged residual trace and transfer checks preserve the distinction between communication and transformation, though its repeated summaries add modest density.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson turns raw token streams into shifted next-token targets and connects cross-entropy to teacher forcing and autoregressive generation.
wholePageReview.feedback: Input-target alignment, segment-boundary choices, masking, and loss interpretation are technically coherent and explicitly labeled as data contracts. The worked shift, code trace, and unfamiliar changed sequence make the off-by-one mechanism visible and objectively checkable.

wholePageReview.synopsis: This synthesis page guides learners through building, tracing, training, and validating a small GPT-2-style model with preserved artifacts.
wholePageReview.feedback: Architecture, shape contracts, causal masking, target shifting, initialization, and validation boundaries are accurate and appropriately scoped. The extensive capstone scaffolding is unusually dense but remains ordered, self-contained, prediction-led, and clear about what a course-scale run cannot establish.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The overview frames pretraining as a linked system of data, objective, scale, optimization, evaluation, and checkpoint decisions.
wholePageReview.feedback: It accurately prevents the common reduction of pretraining to one long training command and distinguishes training telemetry from capability evidence. The chapter map and changed-case assessment orient later specialist lessons well, with only mild repetition between roadmap and objective disclosures.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson compares causal, masked, span-corruption, and mixture objectives by the prediction target and information each example exposes.
wholePageReview.feedback: Objective definitions, masking implications, and denominator choices are accurate and avoid treating loss numbers from different contracts as directly comparable. Concrete token records and transfer decisions make the design trade-offs observable while preserving a coherent narrative from target construction to evaluation.

wholePageReview.synopsis: Scaling laws are presented as empirical planning relationships among parameters, tokens, compute, loss, and uncertainty rather than universal guarantees.
wholePageReview.feedback: The $6ND$ arithmetic, log-log interpretation, budget trade-offs, and confounding warnings are consistent and appropriately qualified. The page sequences estimation, fixture manipulation, and changed-budget transfer effectively, with checks that require calculations before conclusions.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page follows data from rights-aware acquisition through parsing, filtering, deduplication, mixing, decontamination, and versioned shards.
wholePageReview.feedback: It accurately treats provenance, privacy, contamination, and distribution choice as model behavior inputs rather than peripheral cleanup. The worked duplicate and leakage cases, pipeline lab, and transfer audit form a coherent evidence chain with practical retry routes.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson explains distributed training as a coordination problem across memory, parallelism, communication, checkpoints, and failure recovery.
wholePageReview.feedback: Parallelism roles, accumulation, precision, throughput, and checkpoint contracts are accurately separated, with no suggestion that device count alone predicts scaling. The flow from bottleneck diagnosis to deterministic planning and failure transfer gives learners strong systems reasoning practice.

wholePageReview.synopsis: Advanced pretraining objectives are compared by corruption process, supervision density, information availability, and downstream use.
wholePageReview.feedback: Span corruption, fill-in-the-middle, denoising, and mixed-objective boundaries are accurately explained without implying universal superiority. The optional external exercise is clearly separated from required browser work, and objective checks demand explicit record construction and denominator reasoning.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page builds an evaluation portfolio that separates training loss, held-out prediction, downstream tasks, contamination, uncertainty, and severe slices.
wholePageReview.feedback: Metric scope and comparison requirements are technically careful, particularly around tokenizer-dependent perplexity and non-compensable regressions. The narrative proceeds from construct definition to paired evidence and release decisions, with transfer tasks that prevent one headline score from substituting for diagnosis.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The OLMo 3 case study traces a pinned open pretraining recipe from data and stages through evaluation, provenance, and reproducibility limits.
wholePageReview.feedback: Reported details are explicitly source-bounded and separated from course inference, while stage comparisons avoid crediting the final checkpoint without controls. The large synthesis and capstone are dense, but their ordering, artifacts, evidence gates, and failure logs maintain a coherent whole-page learning path.

wholePageReview.synopsis: This bridge page distinguishes next-token pretraining from demonstrations, preferences, rewards, and safety constraints before the post-training sequence.
wholePageReview.feedback: The supervision ladder is accurate and avoids collapsing SFT, DPO, reward modeling, and online RL into one method. Its concise comparison, misconception repair, and changed-case decision establish the prerequisites for the next lessons without introducing unsupported implementation claims.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The overview maps post-training into demonstrations, comparisons, outcome feedback, tool behavior, safety, and independent evaluation.
wholePageReview.feedback: Each stage's artifact and failure mode is correctly differentiated, with explicit reminders that a falling proxy loss is not deployment evidence. The page gives a clean conceptual route into SFT and later RL lessons, reinforced by a local router exercise and changed supervision case.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The SFT page connects demonstration quality, chat serialization, assistant-only labels, regression gates, and a pinned optional QLoRA workshop.
wholePageReview.feedback: The crucial separation between attention visibility and loss contribution is accurate, and the training template, truncation, evaluation, and licensing boundaries are unusually explicit. The required lesson is complete and strongly assessed, while the extensive optional workshop adds repetition and length but remains clearly labeled and operationally careful.
revisionPriorities: Trim repeated execution-boundary wording in the optional workshop while preserving its setup and safety constraints.

wholePageReview.synopsis: Preference optimization is explained through paired labels, policy/reference log-probability gaps, beta conventions, label shortcuts, and drift controls.
wholePageReview.feedback: The page handles the often-confused beta interpretations with explicit fixed-quantity conventions and correct numerical margins. Its verbosity-bias example, DPO trace, and unfamiliar rubric transfer form a coherent progression from relative supervision to proxy-failure diagnosis.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson models generation as states, actions, delayed rewards, returns, baselines, advantages, and conservative policy updates.
wholePageReview.feedback: The mean-baseline example and policy-loss direction are correct, and the page clearly separates trajectory evidence from supervised token labels. The narrative moves effectively from episode definition to variance and drift control, then verifies transfer with delayed tool outcomes and negative advantages.

wholePageReview.synopsis: RLHF is traced from SFT and human comparisons through reward modeling, on-policy rollouts, PPO-style updates, KL control, and reward-hacking audits.
wholePageReview.feedback: Component responsibilities and proxy risks are accurate, and the sampled log-ratio pseudocode is explicitly bounded from full PPO mechanics. The page's reward-exploit narrative and non-compensable health-support transfer provide strong causal and decision practice beyond pipeline memorization.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page treats tool calls as untrusted proposals whose schemas, authorization, confirmation, effects, and recovery are owned by runtime code.
wholePageReview.feedback: The distinctions among learned behavior, authority, prompt injection, least privilege, and over-refusal are technically and operationally sound. A rich decision studio, deterministic action pseudocode, and transferred financial case provide a particularly strong change-observe-explain learning sequence.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The case study joins Tülu 3's curation, SFT, length-normalized DPO, and RLVR with DR Tulu's tool trajectories and evolving research rubrics.
wholePageReview.feedback: Stage claims are source-bounded, the exact-verifier versus open-rubric distinction is clear, and runtime authority stays separate from learned research behavior. The capstone is long and repeats some stage allocation across disclosures and ledgers, but every section contributes inspectable evidence, controls, or transfer.
revisionPriorities: Reduce repetition between objective disclosures and the capstone stage ledger while preserving their distinct checks.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson turns logits into selected tokens through temperature, top-k, top-p, sampling, constraints, and task-specific decoding policies.
wholePageReview.feedback: Softmax probabilities, temperature effects, inclusive nucleus cutoffs, and renormalization examples are correct. The page cleanly separates model knowledge from selection policy and tests transfer across creative, structured, code, and high-risk extraction contracts.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page separates prefill from sequential decode and derives how cached keys and values trade growing memory for avoided recomputation.
wholePageReview.feedback: Cache formulas, projection counts, attention-work comparisons, and the 537 MB worked estimate are consistent. Narrative, calculator, and transfer checks connect single-request mechanics to GQA, prefix sharing, tenant isolation, and serving capacity without losing the core causal thread.

wholePageReview.synopsis: Quantization is developed from scale, integer grid, rounding, and reconstruction error through full inference-memory and hardware-kernel decisions.
wholePageReview.feedback: The signed three-bit example, ideal weight-memory calculations, outlier behavior, and fixture gates are arithmetically correct and carefully labeled. The page's narrative and assessments prevent bit width from standing in for accuracy or speed, while the medical-slice transfer enforces a meaningful deployment boundary.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson frames serving as queue and scheduler design across latency, throughput, utilization, goodput, batching, SLOs, and overload control.
wholePageReview.feedback: Goodput arithmetic, request-window code, tail-latency distinctions, and static-slot calculations are correct and properly qualified. The progression from user metrics to scheduling and numeric admission policies is especially coherent, culminating in a changed traffic mix with class-specific gates.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page explains test-time compute through diverse candidates, search, critique, verifiers, adaptive budgets, and an SLO-aware inference-service capstone.
wholePageReview.feedback: Candidate generation, oracle pass@k, deployable selection, correlated errors, and value-of-compute boundaries are accurate and unusually well tested. The opening defines the capstone deliverable before directly defining the concept, and the extensive service project slightly interrupts the otherwise strong mechanism progression.
revisionPriorities: State the test-time-compute concept definition before the capstone deliverable in the opening block.

wholePageReview.synopsis: Context engineering is taught as an ordered, budgeted interface among authority, evidence, examples, state, and output contracts.
wholePageReview.feedback: The page accurately limits what delimiters and natural-language priority can guarantee, while connecting long context to latency, cache, distraction, and injection risk. Its exact 4,000-token allocation and legal-summary transfer turn prompt advice into measurable design and perturbation tests.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The RAG lesson traces versioned ingestion, chunking, dense and lexical retrieval, reranking, context assembly, citation validation, and abstention.
wholePageReview.feedback: It correctly treats embedding similarity as neither truth nor permission and cleanly separates retrieval recall from grounded-generation failure. The oracle-context example, pipeline lab, and multilingual transfer supply a strong diagnostic flow with independently checkable stage metrics.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page distinguishes fixed workflows from bounded agent loops and assigns state, authority, retries, idempotency, budgets, and termination to the orchestrator.
wholePageReview.feedback: The observe-decide-act model and failure-recovery guidance are technically sound, including the ambiguous non-idempotent timeout case. The narrative proceeds from least autonomy to one validated transition and whole-trajectory evaluation, with a strong transfer that chooses a workflow plus one bounded branch.

wholePageReview.synopsis: Evaluation is built from a release decision through representative cases, mixed graders, judge calibration, paired uncertainty, slices, and severe-failure gates.
wholePageReview.feedback: Construct validity, position bias, deterministic versus human versus model grading, and regression analysis are accurately distinguished. The 65/64 percent judge audit and regulated-slice transfer create an exceptionally coherent path from measurement error to a changed ship decision.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson threat-models LLM systems across data, users, retrieval, models, tools, output handling, privacy, and incident response.
wholePageReview.feedback: It accurately explains why token labels cannot create an internal privilege boundary and puts cross-tenant filtering before model exposure. The staged controls, authorization pseudocode, and hiring transfer connect injection, data minimization, fairness, and appeal without relying on prompt-only security.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page links privacy-aware traces, stage metrics, cost attribution, SLOs, owners, release gates, canaries, rollback, and incident learning.
wholePageReview.feedback: Tracing fields, proxy boundaries, cost-per-success reasoning, and governance controls are accurate and tied to reproducible decisions. The opening foregrounds the capstone artifact rather than the core observability definition, and the large operations project adds density, but its learning evidence and incident transfer remain exemplary.
revisionPriorities: Introduce the core observability-and-governance definition before describing the capstone package.

wholePageReview.synopsis: Distillation is compared across response, logit, feature, sequence, and on-policy supervision with capacity, calibration, provenance, and total-cost limits.
wholePageReview.feedback: Soft-target temperature, KL loss scaling, teacher-error inheritance, and response-only API constraints are accurately handled. The narrative flows from richer supervision to coverage and cost, with a support-model transfer that forces method choice from actually available teacher signals.

wholePageReview.synopsis: LoRA is derived as a scaled low-rank additive update with explicit shapes, parameter counts, initialization, target modules, QLoRA, and deployment choices.
wholePageReview.feedback: The $BA$ dimensions, 131,072-parameter calculation, 128-times reduction, and zero-delta gradient explanation are correct. Runnable code, rank fixtures, and tenant-routing transfer produce a clean progression from matrix mechanism to operational compatibility and rollback.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The MoE lesson separates total parameter capacity from per-token active compute through top-k routing, expert capacity, balancing, dispatch, and communication.
wholePageReview.feedback: Router probabilities, selected-weight renormalization, capacity arithmetic, and overflow counts are correct. The page's sequence from one token route to all-to-all bottlenecks and a matched production diagnosis keeps sparse-FLOP claims proportional to real memory and network costs.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page traces images, audio, and video through modality encoders, positioned features, connectors, fusion designs, decoding, and grounding evaluation.
wholePageReview.feedback: Patch counts, tensor reshaping, projection/cross-attention/unified-token distinctions, and resolution-cost trade-offs are accurate. The gray-noise diagnosis and audio transfer separate perception from language-prior reasoning, giving the page strong causal flow and modality-specific learning checks.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The final page distinguishes behavior, attribution, probes, causal interventions, and model edits, then builds a controlled intervention capstone around bounded claims.
wholePageReview.feedback: Decodability versus causal use, activation patching, sham controls, locality, persistence, and unlearning boundaries are accurate and consistently conservative. The capstone-first opening and extensive project material make the narrative heavier than the core explanation, but the page's learning content and claim discipline are exceptionally strong.
revisionPriorities: Lead with the behavioral-attribution-probe-causality distinction before introducing the capstone investigation.
